_meta.methodology: BUILD_PROCESS.md (brain -> skills -> 14-param -> modules/canonical -> principles -> unit+browser tests -> verify); detail-panel slice
_meta.scope: onboarding documents (template for the 23-module detail-panel backlog)

title: Detail panels (slice 1): onboarding case -> Documents read-only sub-collection in-screen
business_reason: The UI audit found 23 modules own child tables but show them only on separate flat pages — a case's documents weren't viewable in the context of the case. The brain's quality bar: a child entity must be visible in context of its parent. This slice adds an in-screen Documents detail panel to onboarding cases; it is the template for the remaining 22 modules.
brain_skills: Brain: 'complete' = see the child in context, not just a flat list elsewhere. Skills: 03 Screen Contract (detail panel), 05 API Contract (sub-route), 08 Security (masking on read), 01 Spec Interpreter.

param_14.question: Show a parent record's child rows in an in-screen detail panel.
param_14.answer: Add a reusable kernel helper listChildRecords(table, fk, parentId, actor) (query child by FK + maskRecords + fail-soft). Hand-write the case-scoped sub-route GET /api/staff/schools/onboarding/[id]/documents (gen_modules does not generate sub-collections). gen_ui gains a DETAIL_PANELS registry and emits a read-only detailPanel (listColumns: document_type, review_status, review_note, created_at; no addFields). ModuleTable: addFields is now optional and the Add button is hidden for read-only panels.
param_14.security_implications: staff-read guard (requireStaffScope); rows masked via maskRecords (document_file is private; the panel lists only document_type/review_status/review_note/created_at, not the private file ref); no write path in this slice.
param_14.downstream_dependencies: listChildRecords + DETAIL_PANELS registry are the reusable mechanism for the other 22 modules. A generic sub-collection route/service generator is the eventual P0.6 generalization (this slice hand-writes one sub-route).
param_14.assumptions: Read-only is sufficient for slice 1 (uploading/reviewing documents is a later add/edit slice).

principles_pass.P0.6: listChildRecords + DETAIL_PANELS registry reused by all future detail panels; ModuleTable addFields-optional benefits every panel
principles_pass.P1.9/P2.10: child rows masked on read; private document_file not listed
principles_pass.P4.6: unit (listChildRecords query-by-fk+mask+fail-soft) + browser journey (sub-route + in-screen drawer)

functional: listChildRecords queries by FK + returns masked items + fail-soft empty
sub-route returns ok + items[] for a case
Documents panel opens in-screen for a case
security_owasp: sub-route is staff-read guarded; rows masked; private file ref not surfaced
followup: upload/review documents (add+edit) is a later slice
generalize sub-collection route/service generation (P0.6) to scale to the other 22 modules

verification: tsc clean; unit list_child 2/2 (+145 existing); browser journey 05_onboarding_documents pass; regression journeys green; drift guardrail OK.
